summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of ResizeObserver error suppression, subscription types verification, and all requested features. ALL TESTS PASSED - No ResizeObserver errors detected during dropdown/dialog interactions.

test_results.dashboard_kpis: PASS - Shows 599 CHF revenus, 2 membres actifs, 1 nouveau membre
test_results.members_page: PASS - 12 members displayed with renewal buttons

renewal_dialog.subscription_dropdown: PASS - Shows 5 types: Mensuel, Semestriel, Annuel, 6 Weeks Challenge, 3 Mois
renewal_dialog.billing_toggle: PASS - Shows amount, method, cycle, day fields when enabled
renewal_dialog.resize_observer_errors: PASS - NO errors during dropdown interactions

test_results.add_member_dialog: PASS - Opens correctly with all form fields

settings_types_page.access: PASS - Via Config. Types sidebar link
settings_types_page.add_button: PASS - + Ajouter opens modal with all fields

categories_page.edit_modal: PASS - Opens with pre-filled data (tested: LOYER)
categories_page.put_endpoint: Backend requires kpi_column field - properly handled in UI form

onboarding_page.badge: PASS - Sidebar shows badge with count 9
onboarding_page.historique_table: PASS - Shows 3 completed onboardings (Camille Roux, Caroline Maerten, Chloé Simon)

challenge_page.loads: PASS - Challenge 6 Semaines page with 2 challenges
challenge_page.participants: PASS - Challenge Hiver 2024 shows 6 participants with progression
challenge_page.check_in_boxes: PASS - Check-in indicators are visual (not clickable buttons)
challenge_page.bilans_section: PASS - Bilans hebdomadaires section exists with 'Générer les bilans' button

ghl_funnel_dashboard.component: GHLFunnelSection with sync button, date filters, funnel visualization

resize_observer_verification.global_suppressor: PASS - addEventListener('error', ..., true) in index.js working
resize_observer_verification.dropdown_tests: PASS - All dropdown interactions (renewal, settings, categories) show NO ResizeObserver errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical features verified. ResizeObserver suppression working correctly. 5 membership types confirmed (duplicates removed). Categories edit feature working. Onboarding simplified to 2 tabs. GHL Funnel located in Dashboard Acquisition tab.
